tools.name: helkin_health_check
tools.description: Returns HelkinSwarm system health, active session count, and version.

tools.name: helkin_list_skills
tools.description: Lists all active skills, their domains, tool counts, and risk levels.

tools.name: helkin_get_costs
tools.description: Returns current month Azure spend breakdown by resource. Requires Azure Cost Management access.

tools.name: helkin_test_confirmation
tools.description: Test tool for verifying the Adaptive Card confirmation flow. Returns a simple success message after approval.
